The '''Helmet Squad''' was a [[Squad/Legends|squad]] of [[Prison/Legends|prison]] guards that stood guard in [[Desolation Alley]].

==Oovo IV Uprising==
The squad's greatest service would be during [[Jango Fett/Legends|Jango Fett's]] [[Oovo IV Uprising|mission to Oovo IV]]. When Fett learned of a [[Bounty/Legends|bounty]] posted for prisoner [[Bendix Fust]] by [[Malastare/Legends|Malastare]] [[Crime lord/Legends|crime lord]] [[Sebolto]], Fett immediately set course for Oovo IV, managing to breach the massive deflector shield.

[[File:Helm_Squad_Guard.jpg|thumb|left|Member of the Helmet Squad armed with a stun baton.]]
After pushing through a guard outpost, Jango came across [[Ledd Pinot]] with a group of Helmet Squad guards, Pinot also had a price on his head. All guards were killed in the ensuing firefight. Pinot tried to take Jango down with a stun baton, but was shot to death by the fearless [[Bounty hunter/Legends|bounty hunter]] and the bounty of 4,000 [[Galactic Credit Standard/Legends|credits]], [[Death/Legends|dead]] or alive, was claimed.

When Jango reached the prison supply port, [[Wip Sheff]] was waiting with another legion of guards. Fett slaughtered the guards, claimed the bounty of 4,000 credits on Sheff's head and infiltrated the supply port, arriving in [[Desolation Alley]].

Fett soon arrived in a storage room filled to the brim with more men from the Helmet Squad, including [[Natt Bordo]], who had a price on his head. After claiming the bounty and killing the guards Fett proceeded to [[Sublevel One]].

On breaching the cellblock, Fett came across two more members of the Helmet Squad who had prices on their heads, the [[Trandoshan/Legends|Trandoshan]] [[Frissk]], and the Squad's human leader [[Ballax|"Shank" Ballax]]. Frissk was taken alive.

Following the capture of Bendix Fust, the prison guards of Helmet Squad were pushed into service, again but without a leader, due to "Shank" Ballax's absence.

==Equipment used==
As of the time of the Oovo IV uprising, the men of the Helmet Squad made use of [[Blaster rifle/Legends|blaster rifles]], [[Blaster pistol/Legends|blaster pistols]], [[Missile launcher/Legends|missile launchers]], gun turrets, [[Stun baton/Legends|stun batons]] and heavy repeating blaster rifles.

==Appearances==
*''[[Star Wars: Bounty Hunter]]'' {{1st}}
